scripts.types:worker: wrangler types worker-configuration.d.ts --config dist/server/wrangler.json --env-interface Env --include-runtime false
scripts.types:check: wrangler types worker-configuration.d.ts --config dist/server/wrangler.json --env-interface Env --include-runtime false --check
scripts.data:refresh: cd .. && uv run python scripts/export_serving_data.py --storage r2 --region xsmb --output frontend/public/data/xsmb-demo.json && uv run python scripts/export_serving_data.py --storage r2 --region xsmn --output frontend/public/data/xsmn-demo.json && uv run python scripts/export_serving_data.py --storage r2 --region xsmt --output frontend/public/data/xsmt-demo.json
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run types:check && node --test tests/rendered-html.test.mjs
